messages.content: 妹妹采花 sister picks flowers

彝族的传统医学有数千年的历史使用草药针灸和火灸治疗疾病
󲸅󲝃󲲯󳚼󲾰󳗲󳍃󲞯󲿜󳗃󲿿󲴷󳎤󲞚󲱁󲱀󳃋󳔋󳂁󳎨 yi traditional medicine has thousands of years of history using herbal medicine acupuncture and moxibustion to treat illness

学生写作业 student writes homework
彝族人民世世代代居住在云贵川的山区创造了灿烂的文明 the yi people have lived in the mountainous regions of yunnan guizhou and sichuan for generations creating a brilliant civilization
彝族的火把节是最重要的传统节日人们点火把唱歌跳舞庆祝丰收 the yi torch festival is the most important traditional holiday people light torches sing dance and celebrate the harvest
画家画山水 painter paints landscape
歌手唱情歌 singer sings love song
姐姐织布 sister weaves cloth
彝语属于汉藏语系藏缅语族有自己独特的文字系统和语法结构 yi language belongs to the sino tibetan tibeto burman family with its own unique writing system and grammar structure
孩子唱歌 child sings song
彝族的服饰以黑色和红色为主刺绣精美图案独特每个地区风格不同 yi traditional clothing features black and red colors with exquisite embroidery unique patterns vary by region
彝文是世界上仍在使用的最古老的文字之一有超过八万个字符 yi writing is one of the oldest still used writing systems in the world with over eighty thousand characters
